heading: Why trust this Orlando neighborhood guide
intro: This guide is built from real knowledge of Orlando's zones — what each area actually means for your trip, not just which one is closest to the most famous park.

items.title: Honest area assessments
items.text: Every area is described as it actually is — including the trade-offs. If an area requires a car, has safety caveats, or is overpriced relative to alternatives, this guide says so directly.

items.title: Beyond the parks
items.text: Orlando has a real local dining and neighborhood scene in Winter Park, College Park, and Downtown. This guide covers what's worth your time beyond the resort corridors.

items.title: Transport-aware
items.text: Every area assessment includes the honest transport reality — distances that look short on a map often take 20+ minutes by car. This guide tells you what you can and cannot do without renting.

items.title: Current for 2026
items.text: International Drive has changed significantly with ICON Park and new hotel inventory. This guide reflects the current reality of each area.

footer: If you want to understand Orlando's areas honestly — not just which resort zone to pick — this guide gives you the real picture.
